# resend_template (Resource)

Manages a Resend email template.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "resend_template" "example" {
  name      = "Welcome Email"
  html      = "<p>Hello {{name}}, welcome!</p>"
  subject   = "Welcome!"
  from      = "hello@example.com"
  published = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `html` (String) HTML body.
- `name` (String) Template name.

### Optional

- `alias` (String) Template alias.
- `from` (String) Default sender.
- `published` (Boolean) Set true to publish. Resend has no unpublish endpoint; this only triggers a publish call.
- `reply_to` (String) Default reply-to.
- `subject` (String) Default subject.
- `text` (String) Plain-text body.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Template UUID.
